title: Is There a Monopoly in the Global Digital Services Sector?

summary.about: Whether dominance by a few major digital platforms should automatically be treated as monopoly power.
summary.audience: Competition regulators, digital-platform firms and technology-policy readers.
summary.method: An economic commentary using network effects, marginal costs, switching costs and cross-market competition.
summary.insights: Concentration can create user value through networks, though platforms still need scrutiny where data, attention and market reach reinforce power.
